title: D'kee-class landing ship

The '''''D'kee''-class planetary lander''', also known as the '''''D'kee''-class landing ship''', was used by the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]] during its invasion of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

==Characteristics==
It was used to transport troops into enemy territory and was equipped with [[paralysis canister]]s which could be dropped over a major population area from an altitude of 3,000 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]. They could cover an area of nearly 9 square [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]].<ref name="TABSB" />

The vehicle's maximum atmospheric speed of 750 [[Kilometer per hour/Legends|kilometers per hour]] and was armed with 6 light [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]] and 2 [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]].<ref name="TABSB" />

Due to his fragile construction, the ship could not withstand repeated atmospheric entries so it had a mesh of heat-conducting filaments on the hull to divert heat into a rear exhaust system. Some of the heat was converted to energy and stored in onboard batteries for use.<ref name="TABSB" />

The ''D'kee''-class planetary lander carried a complement of ten [[P'w'eck]] "collector barges" which would be deployed after the target area was bombed with paralysis gas. The ship contained confinement pens which were used to house up to 10,000 prisoners.<ref name="TABSB" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''
